_comment: Eval set v0.3 — v0.2's 42 queries verbatim + generated expansion (scripts/generate_test_set_v03.py, seed 42). Generated ground truth is weak-label: expected = the source course the query was derived from. ADR-0015/0016/0017/0018 re-validation target.

queries.query: graph algorithms BFS DFS shortest paths
queries.rationale: Either Algorithms (CS 5800) or Graph Theory (MATH 7233) is a legitimate hit.
Backprop is core to all three ML offerings.
DS 5230 is the canonical unsupervised + clustering course.
MATH 7237 Theory of Optimization.
Big-data parallel processing is split across CS / INFO / EECE depts.
Statistical learning theory courses.
AI search is covered in Applied AI + CS 7180 Special Topics.
ALY 6040 explicitly + DS 5230 contains data mining.
ALY 6140 Python and Analytics Systems Technology.
EECE 5645 Parallel Processing for Data Analytics.
INFO 6105 is Data Science Engineering; CS 6240 is Large-Scale Parallel Processing.
DS 5110 Essentials of Data Science.

queries.query: course covering deep learning project with Python
queries.rationale: Multi-aspect: deep learning + project + Python — any ML course satisfies.

queries.query: graduate AI seminar with applied focus
queries.rationale: Either Applied AI or CS 7180 Special Topics in AI.

queries.query: course on both clustering and dimensionality reduction techniques
queries.rationale: DS 5230 explicitly covers both.

queries.query: probability and statistics for machine learning practitioners
queries.rationale: ALY 6010 prob+stats foundation; MATH 7243 has the ML+stats angle.

queries.query: Python and SQL together for data engineering
queries.rationale: Spans analytics tools + DS engineering courses.

queries.query: applied capstone project for data science master students
queries.rationale: DS 5500 Capstone or ALY 6080 Integrated Experiential Learning.

queries.query: linear algebra essentials for AI students with no math background
queries.rationale: AAI 5015 Mathematical Concepts is exactly this remedial course.

queries.query: supervised learning regression and classification with theory
queries.rationale: DS 5220 Supervised ML + CS 6140 Machine Learning.
Bare 4-digit number; query_normalizer + slang_dict resolve.
Chinese slang alias for Applied AI.
English short slang via course_aliases.
No-space code variant; query_normalizer regex normalizes to 'AAI 6600'.
Lowercase + space; case-insensitive match via v_course_lookup.
Bare 4-digit; alias-only entry — should hit AAI 6600 even with multiple X 6600 codes since alias is explicit.
Non-existent code — retriever must NOT return AAI 6600 just because dept matches.
Non-existent code with valid dept prefix.

queries.query: asdf qwerty zxcvbnm random keyboard mash
queries.rationale: Pure noise — no semantic match anywhere in the catalog.

queries.query: homework due monday assignment 3 grading rubric
queries.rationale: Query is meta-task language, not a course topic — should not match a specific course.
